Michael
Robertson Jr.

Executive Portfolio · AI Startup Leadership
"A man had an eagle which had grown up among the barnyard fowls. For a time the bird seemed content to be only a chicken. But one day it looked up into the sky and something in it, sleeping until now, awoke. Flapping its wings, it soared away toward the sun and came back again no more.

Too many men meant for the eagle-life content themselves with a barnyard existence. Now and then they feel something divine stirring within them, but are too indolent to wake up their glory and make the effort necessary to take their place in the upper air and among the mountain crags."
— Things That Endure
James Russell Miller & John Thompson Faris

Who I am
Mission & values
"Leave every place better than you found it."
// governing philosophy · Personal motto: Think Long. Create Value. Be Honest.
Roots
Lancaster, Pennsylvania
Raised by my grandmother and mother in a working-class family. First-generation college graduate. Failed at solar sales, waited tables at night, door-knocked during the day — until a LinkedIn message from a former YMCA parent changed everything. Eight years and four AI startups later, here I am.
How I operate
Systems builder shaped by constraint
My confidence is earned through execution, not assumed through title. I'm comfortable being underestimated early — my orientation is toward eventual correctness, not immediate validation. I don't seek to dominate rooms. I seek to leave them better structured than I found them.

Values
Ambition
Set bold goals. Never settle for the barnyard when you were built to soar.
Integrity
Do what's right, not what's easy. Transparent and client-first, always.
Respect
Value people and perspectives. Earn trust through consistency and care.
Collaboration
Build ecosystems where partners, clients, and teams win together.

Full career arc · Most recent first
Professional experience
Reevo
Founding Account Executive — 1 of 3 founding closers
Oct 2025 – Present

Pre-product-launch AI SaaS. Joined before the product shipped. First quota-carrying quarter: $28K on $3K quota — 933% attainment. First founding closer to generate revenue. Designed the paid pilot structure (90-day / per-user), built the Sales ↔ CS operating framework, developed battle cards, represented Reevo at Catalyst SF (Jan 2026), won Reevo Weekly OB Champion recognition, and expanded into Australia. Secured public case study commitment from Marytech.

933% attainment — Q1 President's Club First revenue generated Australia expansion Pilot framework built from zero
CEO Hugh Willoughby — "Closed our largest deal to date. You did this the right way: sold the vision, got to power, aligned executives, drove urgency."
Reevo Slack #gtm-winner-winner-chicken-dinner — Growth Architects, $15,000. Dec 10, 2025. Owner: Michael Robertson.
Legacy: True zero-to-one. Defined ICP, pricing, and pilot structure while actively closing — proved a systems builder can also be the best closer in the room.
Revenue Optimization & Impact, LLC (ROI Architects)
Founder & Principal — Integrated Systems & Governance Architect
2024 – Present

Single-operator consultancy — demand generation, AI governance, and territory strategy. Active work: "The Governance Gap" AI compliance decay thesis (Robertson Governance Intensity Grid, AI Governance Master Checklist), full demand gen operating model, customer briefs for Databricks / IBM / Raytheon, and "Scrambled" — a consumer encryption platform with provisional patent in progress.

AI Governance thesis Demand gen operating model Provisional patent — Scrambled
Vultron
Senior Business Development & Operations Lead
Feb 2025

AI platform for federal contractors. Joined during leadership turnover and layoffs. Designed conference ROI framework, SDR prioritization system, and Sales → Engineering → CS handoff processes. Sourced enterprise opps with IBM, Databricks, Caterpillar, and KBR. Onboarded federal channel partner.

Federal AI · Compliance IBM · Databricks · KBR · Caterpillar Systems installed during restructure
Legacy: Created order in chaos. Built systems that outlived leadership changes.
Spot AI
Senior Account Executive — Public Sector (Founding SLED Rep)
2024 – 2025

AI video analytics (slip & fall, PPE, operational intelligence). Joined as founding public-sector rep to test SLED PMF. Despite no product-market fit, closed $94K net-new, 3 logos across all tiers, sourced and trained 3 channel partners, converted a community sponsorship into the City of Westminster. Built Spot's first SLED sales deck, cadences, and one-pagers from zero.

Founding SLED rep Q2 Outbound Hustle MVP $94K net-new · 3 logos 3 channel partners
Spot AI Weekly Sales Sync — OB Pipe Created QTD: Michael Robertson 16 vs. next highest rep at 3. 5× the field.
Spot AI outbound wins — public sector pipeline built from scratch
Q2 2024 Outbound Hustle MVP — "Good things happen to those who hustle."
Legacy: Even in a structurally misaligned market, generated revenue and proved grit over circumstances.
Verkada
Associate AE (Verkacademy) → Account Executive → Senior Account Executive
2021 – 2024

AI-powered physical security SaaS. Recruited off the Drishti SDR award. Set the SQL record (98 in one quarter). Promoted in 6 months. Inherited Central & Southern Colorado — broken territory, brand distrust, no channel. Rebuilt: 600+ accounts mapped, lost opps reactivated, partner certification hosted at PPLD, community events converted into deals. Closed $3M+, 44 net-new logos, 113% avg attainment over 9 quarters. Selected to help launch Philadelphia office.

$3M+ closed · 44 logos Director's Club 2023 113% avg · 9 quarters 10+ channel partners Philadelphia office launch
Verkada performance dashboard — $2,957,723 lifetime bookings · $435K quota · 65% net-new · Peak quarter $791K (FY2023-Q3) · Top account: Trinidad Jr. College $515K

Trinidad Jr. College close — $515K top account
Mayor's community breakfast — Colorado Springs territory development

Drishti Technologies (Acquired by Apple, 2021)
Office Assistant → Project Manager → Sales Development Representative
Jul 2018 – Feb 2021

Joined at seed stage (30 employees) via a LinkedIn message from a former YMCA parent. Enterprise AI computer vision for manufacturing. Grew through three functions in 2.5 years. As SDR: built ICP targeting, outbound cadences, and battle cards from zero. Booked the first Apple meeting — contributing to the 2021 acquisition. Generated $1.5M pipeline; delivered 75% of company bookings in FY2020. Helped propel the company to Series B.

Seed → Series B → Acquired by Apple 2021 SDR of the Year 2020 Presidents Club 2020 133% avg attainment $1.5M pipeline · 75% co. bookings
Drishti 2020 Sales Team of the Year — Michael Robertson, SDR
Drishti era — early startup chapter, Palo Alto
Legacy: From opening the office and making coffee to booking the Apple meeting. Built credibility through systems, consistency, and mentorship.
YMCA Silicon Valley · YMCA Metro Dallas · Hidden Villa
Environmental Educator → Director of Specialty Sports
2014 – 2017

Farm & wilderness counselor, environmental science educator, ropes course facilitator — then promoted to Director of Specialty Sports at YMCA Silicon Valley. Led 60+ seasonal staff across 12 summer programs. Built training frameworks for youth safety and engagement. Managed operations for the flagship program before the tech pivot.

60+ staff led 12 summer programs First people-leadership role
Legacy: Built the people-leadership foundation — how to motivate teams, operate under constraint, and lead with purpose before there's revenue attached to it.

Leadership philosophy

"Build trust before transactions" — not a strategy. A standard. I lead with Ambition, operate with Integrity, show up with Respect, and build with Collaboration. No territory, deal, or system was ever won alone.
